title: Transfers
subtitle: Move money between your own accounts. Transfers are not income or expense.

list.title: Your transfers
list.empty: No transfers yet. Move money between two of your accounts to see it here.
list.needAccounts: You need at least two accounts to make a transfer. Add another account first.

form.title: New transfer
form.intro: Move money between two of your own accounts. This is not income or expense.
form.saveError: We couldn't save this transfer. Please try again.
form.sameAccountError: Pick a different account to transfer to.

amountReceived.helper: The actual amount that arrived in the destination account.

amount.invalid: Enter an amount greater than zero.

fees.heading: Fees
fees.helper: Each fee becomes an expense in the “Fees” category on the chosen account.
fees.label: Fee label

delete.title: Delete this transfer?
delete.body: This removes the transfer and restores the balances. Any fees recorded with it stay as expenses in the “Fees” category and are not deleted.
delete.error: We couldn't delete this transfer. Please try again.

error.title: Transfers are unavailable
error.description: We couldn't load your transfers. Please try again.
